brand.name: Amarka
brand.tagline: NYC's precision laser engraving studio for the trade
brand.description: Amarka supplies bespoke engraved signage, wayfinding, hospitality fitout elements, awards, and architectural accents for interior designers, contractors, and commercial operators across the NYC metro.

hero.eyebrow: Bespoke Laser Engraving Studio · NYC Metro
hero.title: Precision Engraving for NYC's Finest Spaces.
hero.subtitle: We supply bespoke engraved elements — signage, wayfinding, bar fitout, awards, and architectural accents — to interior designers, general contractors, and premium hospitality groups across New York. Stamford studio. 5–10 day turnaround.

seo.defaultTitle: Amarka | Bespoke Laser Engraving Studio for NYC Trade Clients
seo.defaultDescription: AMARKA is the NYC metro laser engraving studio for interior designers, general contractors, hospitality groups, and corporate operators. Stamford, CT studio. 5-10 business day turnaround.
defaultKeywords: laser engraving for interior designers NYC

maintenance.title: Studio maintenance
maintenance.description: The Amarka site is temporarily offline for updates. Email studio@amarka.co for urgent project enquiries.
